name: DISPOSABLE SURGEON GOWNS & ISOLATION GOWNS
description: High-performance protective apparel for surgical teams.
longDescription: From SMS Standard to Wrap-around Reinforced protection, our surgeon gowns are designed for maximum safety in the OR.

name: DISPOSABLE PATIENT GOWNS AND PATIENT WEARS
description: Full range of patient apparel including standard, full-sleeve, and sleeveless designs.
longDescription: Our patient gowns are lightweight, breathable, and provide excellent coverage.

name: DISPOSABLE BED SHEETS, COVERING SHEETS AND PILLOW COVERS
description: Premium SMS & PP Spun Bond solutions for hospital beds, examination couches.
longDescription: Our disposable bed sheets and covering sheets provide a superior moisture barrier and hygiene.

name: DISPOSABLE OPERATION THEATRE SHEETS
description: Essential sterile packs and drapes for general surgical interventions.
longDescription: Engineered for maximum fluid control and sterile field integrity.

name: DISPOSABLE STERILIZATION WRAPPING SHEETS
description: Clinical-grade SMS barrier sheets for instrument tray sterilization.
longDescription: Made from high-performance SMS fabric, our wrapping sheets provide an effective microbial barrier.

name: GENERAL DISPOSABLE ITEMS
description: Essential protective covers and clinical accessories.
longDescription: Provides complete sterile protection for clinical equipment and surgical staff.

name: DISPOSABLE SURGICAL DRAPE PACKS & KITS
description: Dedicated custom packs for Cardiovascular, Urology, Neurology, and specialized procedures.
longDescription: Comprehensive range of specialized drape packs tailored to surgical requirements.
